docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-09-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORGAN, DENISE $2,656.08 PRINCIPAL, $227.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,883.58 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT MORGAN, DENISE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,656.08 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT MORGAN, DENISE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-09-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $227.50 SERVED JUN-09-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MORGAN, DENISE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-09-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-09-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DENISE MORGAN IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
